channel.title: Blogs on Call me Sam
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Call me Sam

item.title: Nearest Neighbour Classifier
item.description: Anybody who have a glimpse of machine learning does know about nearest neighbour classifier as it is one of the starting lessons of machine learning. If not, you can continue. Here we will know the basic knowledge about nearest neighbour classifier by predicting the label of image. We can train images with a suitable labels done by mapping to predict the images. For example, we will label the image below as ‘Dog’.
